form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Fake Friends at Menangle over 1609m in a 3yo 0Ws/TS on March 24 at $51. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Grumpyshannon at Newcastle over 1609m in a 3yo NR up to 60 on March 28 at $4.80. Ready to win and should get every chance from the ace draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Fake Friends at Menangle over 1609m in a 3yo 0Ws/TS on March 24 at $51. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Grumpyshannon at Newcastle over 1609m in a 3yo NR up to 60 on March 28 at $4.80. Ready to win and should get every chance from the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Unable to secure clear running in the early stages of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 45 m by Perfectdelight (2:02.30) in 3yo No NR F on March 28 at $10. Before that, 4th (Fr1) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 5th-7.94 beaten 13 m by Willows Girl (2:04.20) in 3yo No NR F on March 23 at $26. Draws well so worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to initially score up and then out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 2040m at Parkes, beaten 11 m by Krista Bellita (2:33.20) in 2 WINs on April 4 at $5. Before that, 7th (Sr2) over 1720m at Penrith, beaten 40 m by Inside Magic (2:05.90) in 3yo NR up to 55 on March 26 at $10. Draws for a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 2040m at Parkes, beaten 11 m by Krista Bellita (2:33.20) in 2 WINs on April 4 at $5. Before that, 7th (Sr2) over 1720m at Penrith, beaten 40 m by Inside Magic (2:05.90) in 3yo NR up to 55 on March 26 at $10. Draws for a good showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to weaken near the 400m and gave ground over the concluding stages.
Inconvenienced at the 1400m when the pace in the running line eased.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Soho Charmer at this track over 1730m in a 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $71. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing third behind Rewatch at this track over 1730m in a 3yo No NR CG on March 28 at $81. Can retain the good form.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing third behind Rewatch at this track over 1730m in a 3yo No NR CG on March 28 at $81. Can retain the good form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 400m shifted out placing Talk To Lexy in restricted room.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 1730m at this track beaten 30 m by Yottie (2:) in 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $81. At the run before 9th (Sr2) over 1730m after racing wide at this track beaten 25 m by In Lexys Words (2:04.60) in 3yo NR up to 55 on March 11 at $1.95. Race fit and better placed.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track was 2nd-0.9 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Rewatch (2:06.00) in 3yo No NR CG on March 28 at $26. Before that, a game effort when 3rd (Fr7) over 1730m at this track was 2nd-1.98 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Soho Charmer (2:02.40) in 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $81. Likely to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung inwards under pressure in the home straight.
Gate speed and led the one wide line throughout.

form.formComment: Last start a big 3.5 m win (Fr8) at this track (2:45.70) beating Take Out in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $8.50 at the bell was 2nd-3.14. Chance to make it two in a row.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start a big 3.5 m win (Fr8) at this track (2:45.70) beating Take Out in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $8.50 at the bell was 2nd-3.14. Chance to make it two in a row.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke clear of interference passing the 1100m.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 28. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 8th-22.22 beaten 17 m by Message Bank (2:02.20) in 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $101. No surprise if he turned things around.

formComments.comment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 28. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Check and broke gait near the 400m.
Hung in rounding the turn approaching the 1400m.

form.formComment: Has won at his last two outings. Last start posted a big 12 m win as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:05.80) beating Harveys Tooth in MAIDEN on April 1 at $1.35 at the bell was 4th-5.5. Will find this a lot tougher.
